title: Minimal Aeronautics
description: Minimal modpack with Create: Aeronautics, Farmers Delight and a few Optimization mods
body:
A **lightweight** Create modpack built around **Create: Aeronautics**. This is not like other modpacks that are just a lot of mods thrown together. This modpack is focused on only *a small amount of mods*, which are Farmer's Delight, Create and Create Aeronautics. 

Although the small amount of mods results in *very good performance*, a few optimization mods are included. **Higher FPS** are always better!

If you have any problems with the modpack, feedback or just want to talk with me, you can contact me on Discord (Username: eisbaeri3000)
